negative_base: child, loli, teen, underage, young-looking, unsafe sexual content, adult-content artifacts, bad anatomy, extra limbs, deformed hands, malformed fingers, blurry, low quality, messy face, text, watermark, logo

benchmark_anime_elf.description: Stable public benchmark character for regression tests.
benchmark_anime_elf.positive: adult anime elf woman, elegant pointed ears, long flowing silver hair, emerald green eyes, graceful fantasy portrait, ornate emerald-and-gold outfit, soft glowing magic particles, clean lineart, polished anime shading, high-end illustration, beautiful face, detailed eyes, vibrant colors, studio-quality composition, no text, no watermark

cinematic_fantasy_elf.description: Public cinematic fantasy style stress test, non-explicit.
cinematic_fantasy_elf.positive: adult elven woman, cinematic fantasy portrait, elegant pointed ears, long silver-white hair, emerald green eyes, ornate emerald-and-gold fantasy robe and armor, moonlit elven palace, silk fabric, glowing magical particles, realistic skin texture, detailed face, sharp eyes, premium fantasy magazine cover, soft cinematic lighting, shallow depth of field, high detail, non-explicit, no text, no watermark
cinematic_fantasy_elf.negative_extra: anime, cartoon, plastic skin, uncanny face

armor_detail_stress_test.description: Public detail stress test for jewelry, armor, fabric, and face coherence.
armor_detail_stress_test.positive: adult high elf queen, formal emerald-and-gold ceremonial armor, intricate filigree jewelry, layered silk cloak, pointed ears, silver braided hair, emerald eyes, symmetrical face, detailed armor engravings, magical forest throne room, polished fantasy illustration, clean composition, non-explicit, no text, no watermark
armor_detail_stress_test.negative_extra: melted armor, broken jewelry, fused fabric, distorted chest details, realistic photo

private_testing_note: More aggressive private robustness prompts can be useful during local testing, but they are intentionally not included in the public presets.
